subcodes.first_line: When God willeth a thing, He doth but say unto it "Be!" and it is. Praise be unto God, possession hath been attained. Blessed is he who hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا اراد الله بشیء ان یقول له کن فیکون الحمد لله ملک گرفته شد طوبی لمن فاز
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @prophecy and fulfillment, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @business; financial; property matters
